name: com.coachfit.sync.adapter.in.StravaJobConsumer
comment:
Redis Stream consumer for the {@code sync:jobs} stream.

Implements the worker side of docs/06-sync-engine-spec.md §Redis Stream Design:

  • Consumer group: {@code sync-workers}
  • Consumer name: {@code worker-1} (single consumer for MVP)
  • Batch: up to 10 messages per poll
  • Retry: up to {@value MAX_ATTEMPTS} times with re-enqueue; then dead-letter
  • Pending recovery: every 5 minutes, reclaims messages idle >60s

Scheduling is enabled via {@link EnableScheduling} on this component. For MVP, a single consumer is sufficient; additional consumers can be added to the same group for horizontal scaling.

methods.name: initConsumerGroup
methods.comment: Creates the consumer group on startup if it doesn't exist. Uses {@code MKSTREAM} to also create the stream key if absent.

methods.name: pollJobs
methods.comment:
Polls the {@code sync:jobs} stream every second for new messages.

Uses {@code XREADGROUP} with {@code >} (new messages not yet delivered). Acknowledgement ({@code XACK}) only happens after successful processing.

methods.name: recoverPendingMessages
methods.comment:
Every 5 minutes: reclaims messages that have been pending for more than 60 seconds. This handles the case where the worker crashed mid-processing.

Per spec: "Scheduled job check XPENDING every 5 minutes, reclaim messages idle >60s".
